methodology.baseMetadata: RePoE base_items raw data, joined by the PoE2DB Metadata ID.
methodology.modifierSelection: PoE2DB embedded ModsView JSON for Focus.
methodology.weightEvaluation: Ordered first matching spawn/generation weight from RePoE raw mod data; PoE2DB DropChance retained separately.
methodology.importantFinding: PoE2DB embeds only the already selected Focus DropChance and tag names, not complete per-tag numeric weights.

restrictedModFinding: No such examples exist: every imported normal Focus modifier matches the shared 'focus' tag before any zero-weight fallback. Extra base tags do not occur in these modifiers' weight rules.
